'''Rebecca Moesta''' is an author who made a number of contributions to ''[[Star Wars]]'' fiction in the 1990s. She is the co-author of the ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights|Young Jedi Knights]]'' young readers series with her husband, [[Kevin J. Anderson]], and she also wrote three books in the ''[[Star Wars: Junior Jedi Knights]]'' series. Moesta additionally penned the short story "[[Trade Wins: The Ranat's Tale]]" in the anthology book ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', and co-authored [[The Mos Eisley Cantina Pop-Up Book|two]] [[Jabba's Palace Pop-up Book|pop-up]] books with Anderson.

{{Author-stub}}
